tracks.meaning: a thin cord or wire used to produce sound on musical instruments like guitars, violins, or pianos
a thin cord-like anatomical structure in the body, such as a tendon, ligament, or nerve fiber
a series of objects or events threaded together in a line or sequence
a sequence of characters or data stored as a continuous unit in a computer
a thin line or narrow mark made on a surface
a very small distance or amount of something
to string someone along means to keep someone interested or hopeful without committing to anything
a text or sequence of characters used in programming and data processing
a condition attached to an offer or agreement that must be met
a series of words, messages, or statements connected together
